content.content:
edc6525d1 libm/riscv: consolidate stack frame prologue/epilogue in assembly
ea9790ae0 libc/riscv: fix lib_machine link_whole to use per-target variables
8a6ebdc47 stdio: expand ungetc buffer to a 255-character stack
bce482e2f stdio: remove __nonnull((1)) from fflush and handle fflush(NULL)
c58a7d647 stdio: set error flag when trying to write to read stream by putc/fputc

toolUseResult.stdout:
edc6525d1 libm/riscv: consolidate stack frame prologue/epilogue in assembly
ea9790ae0 libc/riscv: fix lib_machine link_whole to use per-target variables
8a6ebdc47 stdio: expand ungetc buffer to a 255-character stack
bce482e2f stdio: remove __nonnull((1)) from fflush and handle fflush(NULL)
c58a7d647 stdio: set error flag when trying to write to read stream by putc/fputc

content.text: 22 new test files for single-precision float math functions are staged.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
libm/riscv: add standalone accuracy tests for all float math functions

Add test programs for 22 single-precision math functions (acosf through
tanhf) to enable quick correctness validation of Andes assembly
implementations against the toolchain's reference libm.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
